MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT YEN YU LIU (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS GARY LIU)'s MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
Off Calendar Mar-20-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: In-Person Appearances

Jeffrey Chen Esq., Law Offices of Jeffrey Chen, 888-418-837, for plaintiff
Yuan Chang Liu, Pro Per Claimant
Aidong Ni, Mandarin Interpretor

Hearing Held. Mr. Yuan Chang Liu presents to the court his driver license as evidence in support of the claim. Mr. Chen learns that claimant, Yuan Chang Liu is one of the named defendant, Johnson Liu. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT YUAN LIU HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION is denied.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2022 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being continued from Oct-06-2022 for further hearing on Plaintiff's motion for default judgment.

Dept. 514; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Bailiff: Deputies Choi & Tauscher; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:15:47 a.m. and concluding at 10:29:53 a.m.

Plaintiff The David L.K. Huang Revocable Trust represented by Jeffrey A. Chen, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Johnson Liu not appearing.

Plaintiff's Supplemental Brief re: Motion to Enter Default Judgment filed Oct-12-2022.
Court finds this matter can be heard and does not need to proceed as an unlawful detainer.

DONGNA FANG, Trustee is placed under oath and testifies.
The matter is submitted.

Alan Chiang is hereby DISMISSED.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff The David L.K. Huang Revocable Trust, and against Defendant Johnson Liu and Gary Liu for POSSESSION ONLY.

Proposed judgment is signed and filed as modified.

Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-06-2022 Continued To Oct-17-22 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar on calendar set for plaintiff's motion for default judgment.

Dept. 514; Judge: Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Bailiff: Deputies Choi & Bastain; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:27:59 a.m. sn concluding 11:36:46 p.m.

Plaintiff The David L. K. Huang Revocable Trust UTD 9/14/2016 represented by Jeffrey A. Chan, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Johnson Liu not appearing.

DOGNA FANG, Trustee is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Does dismissed on 10/05/2022.

Testimony not presented.
Court cannot determine if this matter should be heard as an Unlawful Detainer in Dept. 501.
Court must confirm the Defendant has not required tenant rights.

Plaintiff shall file a supplemental brief identifying landlord/tenant law by 10/13/2022.
Court orders matter continued to 10/17/2022 at 10:00 a.m. in Department 514 for further briefing and plaintiff's motion for default judgment.
